# UI Judge Comment

Creates or updates a pull request comment from a Rust-generated UI Judge
markdown report.

The action expects `body-file` to point at a markdown file. The Rust UI Judge
CLI writes this file with:

```bash
cargo run -p ui_judge --bin ui-judge -- judge-android-agent \
  --scenarios packages/genui/ui-judge/tests/scenarios/android-geqi.json \
  --result-file ui-judge-results.json \
  --comment-file ui-judge-comment.md \
  --all-geqi
```

If model scoring cannot run, use the Rust `report` subcommand to write a
fallback markdown comment before the CI job uploads the artifact:

```bash
cargo run -p ui_judge --bin ui-judge -- report \
  --result-file ui-judge-results.json \
  --comment-file ui-judge-comment.md \
  --fallback-error "Rust UI Judge Android model scoring failed."
```

Example:

```yaml
permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write

steps:
  - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
    with:
      name: ui-judge-report
      path: ui-judge-report

  - uses: ./.github/actions/ui-judge-comment
    with:
      body-file: ui-judge-report/ui-judge-comment.md
```

Inputs:

- `body-file`: path to the markdown report generated by Rust UI Judge.
- `pr-number`: pull request number. Defaults to the `pull_request` event.
- `marker`: hidden marker used to update a previous comment.
- `update-existing`: update the previous marked comment. Defaults to `true`.
- `github-token`: token for the GitHub API. Defaults to `github.token`.
